description_long: This object is a collection of modern office buildings arranged in a linear fashion, each with distinct rectangular and cubic forms. The buildings vary in height and width, with some featuring tall, slender towers and others appearing as shorter, blockier structures. The exteriors are primarily clad in light gray and blue-tinted materials, with large window panels arranged in regular, vertical patterns. Green rooftop sections and landscaped bases are visible, suggesting integrated urban greenery or rooftop gardens. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation. The buildings are set on individual plots, separated by small green spaces, evoking a planned business district or office park.
description: A group of sleek, modern office buildings with glass facades, varying heights, and green rooftop sections, arranged in a linear urban layout.
description_view_0: A side view showing the narrow profiles of the buildings, emphasizing their depth and the separation between each structure.
description_view_1: A frontal view displaying the full lineup of office buildings, highlighting their varying heights, window patterns, and green rooftop areas.
description_view_2: The opposite side view, again showing the narrow profiles and the staggered arrangement of the buildings.
description_view_3: A rear or alternate frontal view, similar to view 1, showing the lineup of buildings with their facades and rooftop greenery.
attribute_window_pattern: Regular vertical rows of rectangular windows, evenly spaced and repeated across each facade.
